creator: noah.bergbauer@tum.de
text:
>>I don't understand why your 'pfctl -si' would then only show 31 states.
>I think that the `pfctl -si` shows the counters just when the problem start.

It's the same for me. As far as I remember, this behavior is easily explained by the fact that these counters are updated regularly by the purge thread, so ... yeah. Frozen purge thread means frozen counters.
